spanish: Esos llegan aquí sin saber decir ni hola y en un año ya están hablando español como si nada
english: Those arrive here without knowing how to say even hello and in a year they're already speaking Spanish like it's nothing
explanation: Imperfect subjunctive or conditional context - como si + past subjunctive (nada) expressing hypothetical comparison

spanish: Si fuera solo por dinero, lo lógico sería ir a Estados Unidos
english: If it were just for money, the logical thing would be to go to the United States
explanation: Imperfect subjunctive (fuera) + conditional (sería) - hypothetical situation in the present

spanish: O aprendes o te quedas fuera
english: Either you learn or you stay out
explanation: O... o... structure (either... or...) - disjunctive conjunctions presenting alternatives
